anti_patterns.title: Fixed conversion overlay interrupts reading
anti_patterns.do_not: Place a persistent marketing or subscription overlay over the reading column.

anti_patterns.title: Body copy shrunk to force above-the-fold density
anti_patterns.do_not: Reduce article body type or line measure simply to fit more modules before the fold.

good_bad.good: Article text is sized and measured for sustained reading.
good_bad.bad: The article rule fixes body copy at 12px to make room for promos.

anti_patterns.title: Byline buried after promotion
anti_patterns.do_not: Hide author and publication context below unrelated promotional material.
